'''âz-l-zh''' ('''kazalazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wakken|wakken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wakken|wakken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazalazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizalazh|thizalazh]] || [[word:jizalazh|jizalazh]] || [[word:shizalazh|shizalazh]] || [[word:kizalazh|kizalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzalazh|thuthuzalazh]] || [[word:jujuzalazh|jujuzalazh]] || [[word:shushuzalazh|shushuzalazh]] || [[word:kukuzalazh|kukuzalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzalazh|thuzalazh]] || [[word:juzalazh|juzalazh]] || [[word:shuzalazh|shuzalazh]] || [[word:kuzalazh|kuzalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzalazh|thuzalazh]] || [[word:juzalazh|juzalazh]] || [[word:shuzalazh|shuzalazh]] || [[word:kuzalazh|kuzalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezalazh|thezalazh]] || [[word:jezalazh|jezalazh]] || [[word:shezalazh|shezalazh]] || [[word:kezalazh|kezalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozalazh|thothozalazh]] || [[word:jojozalazh|jojozalazh]] || [[word:shoshozalazh|shoshozalazh]] || [[word:kokozalazh|kokozalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozalazh|thozalazh]] || [[word:jozalazh|jozalazh]] || [[word:shozalazh|shozalazh]] || [[word:kozalazh|kozalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozalazh|thozalazh]] || [[word:jozalazh|jozalazh]] || [[word:shozalazh|shozalazh]] || [[word:kozalazh|kozalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzalazh|thĂŠzalazh]] || [[word:jĂŠzalazh|jĂŠzalazh]] || [[word:shĂŠzalazh|shĂŠzalazh]] || [[word:kĂŠzalazh|kĂŠzalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazalazh|thathazalazh]] || [[word:jajazalazh|jajazalazh]] || [[word:shashazalazh|shashazalazh]] || [[word:kakazalazh|kakazalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazalazh|thazalazh]] || [[word:jazalazh|jazalazh]] || [[word:shazalazh|shazalazh]] || [[word:kazalazh|kazalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazalazh|thazalazh]] || [[word:jazalazh|jazalazh]] || [[word:shazalazh|shazalazh]] || [[word:kazalazh|kazalazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazalazh|shazalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazalazh|goshazalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazalazh|gokishazalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazalazhnĂŒ|shazalazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazalazhnknĂŒ|goshazalazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalazhnĂŒ|gokishazalazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazalazhshĂ«|shazalazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkshĂ«|goshazalazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazalazhshĂ«|gokishazalazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalazhro|shazalazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkro|goshazalazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalazhro|gokishazalazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalazhmu|shazalazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkmu|goshazalazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalazhmu|gokishazalazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazalazhsher|shazalazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazalazhnksher|goshazalazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazalazhsher|gokishazalazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazalazhng|shazalazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkng|goshazalazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazalazhng|gokishazalazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazalazhya|shazalazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkya|goshazalazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazalazhya|gokishazalazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazalazhyam|shazalazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkyam|goshazalazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazalazhyam|gokishazalazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalazhnĂŒshĂ«|shazalazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazalazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazalazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalazhnĂŒro|shazalazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalazhnknĂŒro|goshazalazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalazhnĂŒro|gokishazalazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalazhnĂŒmu|shazalazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalazhnknĂŒmu|goshazalazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalazhnĂŒmu|gokishazalazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shazalazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazalazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazalazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalazhshĂ«ro|shazalazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkshĂ«ro|goshazalazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalazhshĂ«ro|gokishazalazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalazhshĂ«mu|shazalazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkshĂ«mu|goshazalazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalazhshĂ«mu|gokishazalazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalazhronĂŒ|shazalazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkronĂŒ|goshazalazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalazhronĂŒ|gokishazalazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalazhroshĂ«|shazalazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkroshĂ«|goshazalazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalazhroshĂ«|gokishazalazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalazhromu|shazalazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkromu|goshazalazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalazhromu|gokishazalazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalazhmunĂŒ|shazalazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkmunĂŒ|goshazalazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalazhmunĂŒ|gokishazalazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalazhmushĂ«|shazalazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkmushĂ«|goshazalazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalazhmushĂ«|gokishazalazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalazhmuro|shazalazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalazhnkmuro|goshazalazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalazhmuro|gokishazalazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
